api_key.description: Nylas v3 API key. Sent only as a Bearer token; never logged.

base_url.description: Nylas API base URL. Defaults to the US region host; set to https://api.eu.nylas.com for the EU region. Legacy instead derived this from an api_server ('eu'/other) config key — that cross-key derivation has no engine mechanism today (spec-default materialization only fills a literal per-key default), so this bundle requires the fully-formed base_url for the EU region instead of an api_server switch; see docs.md Known limits.

grant_id.description: Nylas grant id to read. Defaults to 'me' (the connected grant).

calendar_id.description: Calendar id required by the events stream.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
